products.title: Shirley Temple
products.body_html: A blast from the past, our Shirley Temple combines smooth vanilla flavor with bright lemon and lime, finished with cherry juice for that nostalgic grenadine-like flavor. One sip of this timeless soda proves some flavors never grow old.

products.title: Lorem Ipsum (Test product)
products.body_html: Your creamiest, fruitiest strawberry sundae meets bubbly soda. A blend of sweet strawberry juice, rich vanilla, and a dash of tangy lemon create a soda that quenches thirst in the most delightful way.

products.title: Shirley Temple Glass
products.body_html: A vintage-styled soda glass built for floats, fizz, and the perfect pour.

products.title: Shirley Temple Keychain
products.body_html: A cherry-umbrella charm for your keys. Fizzy flair and 100% Shirley approved.

products.title: Shirley Temple Jacket
products.body_html: A retro-inspired letterman jacket in cherry red, straight from the soda shop to your closet.

products.title: Winter Seasonal Ginger Ale
products.body_html: Sweet lime, tart quince, and real ginger root help create a uniquely refreshing yet nostalgic Ginger Ale flavor that will make you feel oh so sophisticated.

products.title: Winter Seasonal Crisp Apple
products.body_html: Like sparkling apple juice and gummy apple rings blending into one, Crisp Apple is so tantalizingly sweet and refreshing it makes every day feel like a celebration.
